nasb.text: The drinking was done according to the law, there was no compulsion, for so the king had given orders to each official of his household that he should do according to the desires of each person.

esv.text: And drinking was according to this edict: “There is no compulsion.” For the king had given orders to all the staff of his palace to do as each man desired.

cnv.text: 飲酒都照著定例，不准勉強；因為王對他宮裡的所有臣僕立下規矩，要照著各人的意願而行。

ccb.text: 喝酒有个规矩，不许勉强人，因为王吩咐过宫里所有的侍从，招待各人要随其所愿。
